---
applyTo: "**/src/*.ts,*.js" 
---

### User Story ###

As an Admin
I want to delete a role
So that I can keep the software information up to date.
Flow will be when logged in as an admin, the admin will see a delete button on the job roles list page and when clicked the admin will be prompted with a warning asking for confirmation before deletion. If the admin confirms, the role will be deleted and the admin will be redirected to the job roles list page.

Acceptance criteria:

Able to delete the role from the job roles list page and the job specification page
Warning must appear asking for confirmation before deletion

We are only working on the backend for this implementation, so the frontend will not be implemented. The frontend will be implemented in a future user story.
